description: You are a Museum/Exhibit Designer converting a waterfront villa into a public aquarium visitor center. Transform the building shell by creating a sequential visitor flow path through specific zones. Your design must include at least 4 new partition walls to separate the open plan and at least 5 distinct named rooms reflecting aquarium zones (e.g., 'Ticketing', 'Main Exhibits', 'Touch Tank', 'Classroom', 'Gift Shop'). Furnish the Exhibits and Retail areas with at least 10 shelving or display units, and the Education and Lobby areas with at least 12 chairs and 4 desks or tables. Draw a continuous visitor flow path with at least 4 distinct points tracing the one-way walking route and include at least 3 text labels highlighting key features. Save the project file when complete.
